title: I've made a major breakthrough using chart analysis! Anyone interested?
author: Admirable_Dark4560
selftext: No one knows how many devastating nights were spent behind this chart. I've experienced stock market losses and periods of sleepless nights. I focus on chart analysis to understand what I'm doing and to explore new methods and trading ideas. I'm not posting this to show off. I just want to tell those who are still losing money and feeling lost that I was once just like you. If you're currently going through a low point, please don't easily give up on yourself 💪
